title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 451.010 - Marriage a civil contract
text:
451.010.  Marriage a civil contract. — Marriage is considered in law as a civil contract, to which the consent of the parties capable in law of contracting is essential.
(RSMo 1939 § 3360) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2973; 1919 § 7298; 1909 § 8279
